/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_interfaces__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/arm_interfaces/libarm_interfaces__python.so CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/arm_interfaces/srv/_calibrate_s.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/arm_interfaces/srv/_home_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bg99/Documents/Projects/robot-arm/software/arm_ros2_ws/build/arm_interfaces:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libarm_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libarm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
